words.meaning_en: To move on foot at a normal pace
words.example_sentence: She walks to school every morning.

words.meaning_en: To move quickly on foot
words.example_sentence: He runs in the park every evening.

words.meaning_en: To push yourself off the ground into the air
words.example_sentence: The children jumped over the puddle.

words.meaning_en: To say words; to speak with someone
words.example_sentence: They talked about their school trip.

words.meaning_en: To pay attention to a sound or what someone says
words.example_sentence: Please listen carefully to the teacher.

words.meaning_en: To look at and understand written words
words.example_sentence: She reads a book before sleeping every night.

words.meaning_en: To make letters or words on paper
words.example_sentence: He wrote a letter to his grandmother.

words.meaning_en: To prepare food by heating it
words.example_sentence: Mum cooks dinner for the family.

words.meaning_en: To remove dirt from something
words.example_sentence: She cleaned her room on Sunday.

words.meaning_en: To clean something with water
words.example_sentence: Wash your hands before eating.

words.meaning_en: To rest with your eyes closed and mind at rest
words.example_sentence: He sleeps for eight hours every night.

words.meaning_en: To stop sleeping and become alert
words.example_sentence: She wakes up at six every morning.

words.meaning_en: To take part in a game or fun activity
words.example_sentence: The children play cricket after school.

words.meaning_en: To gain knowledge or a new skill
words.example_sentence: He is learning to ride a bicycle.

words.meaning_en: To give lessons or explain something to someone
words.example_sentence: The teacher teaches English to the class.

words.meaning_en: To make it easier for someone to do something
words.example_sentence: She helped her mother carry the bags.

words.meaning_en: To hold something and take it from one place to another
words.example_sentence: He carried the heavy box upstairs.

words.meaning_en: To move a door, lid, or cover so it is no longer closed
words.example_sentence: She opened the window to let in fresh air.

words.meaning_en: To shut a door, window, or lid
words.example_sentence: Please close the door when you leave.

words.meaning_en: To press against something to move it away
words.example_sentence: He pushed the door open.

words.meaning_en: To hold and bring something toward you
words.example_sentence: She pulled the rope to ring the bell.

words.meaning_en: To send something through the air by moving your arm
words.example_sentence: He threw the ball to his friend.

words.meaning_en: To take hold of something moving through the air
words.example_sentence: She caught the ball with both hands.

words.meaning_en: To go up something using hands and feet
words.example_sentence: The boy climbed the tree quickly.

words.meaning_en: To move through water using your arms and legs
words.example_sentence: They swim in the pool every weekend.

words.meaning_en: To make a picture using a pencil or pen
words.example_sentence: She drew a picture of a house.

words.meaning_en: To make musical sounds with your voice
words.example_sentence: He sang a song at the school function.

words.meaning_en: To move your body in rhythm to music
words.example_sentence: The girls danced at the festival.

words.meaning_en: To make sounds showing you find something funny
words.example_sentence: Everyone laughed at the funny joke.

words.meaning_en: To shed tears because of pain or strong feelings
words.example_sentence: The baby cried when it was hungry.

words.meaning_en: To rest with your bottom on a surface
words.example_sentence: Please sit down and wait your turn.

words.meaning_en: To be in an upright position on your feet
words.example_sentence: Stand up when the teacher enters the room.

words.meaning_en: To stay in one place until something happens
words.example_sentence: We waited at the bus stop for ten minutes.

words.meaning_en: To look at something carefully over time
words.example_sentence: They watched a movie together on Saturday.

words.meaning_en: To find out how many things there are
words.example_sentence: She counted the apples in the basket.

words.meaning_en: To direct attention using your finger
words.example_sentence: He pointed at the board during the lesson.

words.meaning_en: To hit a door with your knuckles to get attention
words.example_sentence: She knocked on the door before entering.

words.meaning_en: To shout to get attention or to phone someone
words.example_sentence: He called his friend to come and play.

words.meaning_en: To go to see a person or place
words.example_sentence: We visited our grandparents during holidays.

words.meaning_en: To put things into a bag or box for travel
words.example_sentence: She packed her bag the night before the trip.

words.meaning_en: To go and get something and bring it back
words.example_sentence: He fetched water from the well.

words.meaning_en: To make liquid flow from a container
words.example_sentence: She poured milk into the glass.

words.meaning_en: To cut something into pieces with a sharp tool
words.example_sentence: Mum chopped the vegetables for the curry.

words.meaning_en: To clean a floor by pushing dirt with a broom
words.example_sentence: She swept the floor every morning.

words.meaning_en: To bend something flat so one part lies over another
words.example_sentence: He folded his clothes and kept them in the cupboard.

words.meaning_en: To attach something at the top so it hangs down
words.example_sentence: She hung her school bag on the hook.

words.meaning_en: To hurry and move quickly
words.example_sentence: He rushed to school so he would not be late.

words.meaning_en: To talk in a friendly and informal way
words.example_sentence: The friends chatted on the way home.
